overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos during a golden hour sunset. The character navigates wet city streets, passes various vehicles including a taco truck, and explores the area around the Los Santos Forum arena with the Maze Bank tower visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with grass median and commercial buildings

events.description: white taco truck drives past on the right side of the street
camera tilts upward to look at the tall skyscraper against the sunset sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, glancing at passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white taco truck driving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with vertical black lines, dominating the skyline
bright yellow building with metal fire escape stairs
curved strip of green grass between sidewalk and building
row of tall palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a wet city sidewalk during golden hour. The character walks forward as a white taco truck passes by on the right. The camera then tilts up to admire the tall Maze Bank skyscraper against the orange sunset sky, with palm trees and commercial buildings framing the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under parking garage overpass

events.description: entering covered area beneath the parking garage overpass
exiting the covered overpass into open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass toward the large columned arena building

entered.detail: concrete parking structure with red trim creating a covered walkway
large arena building with tall white columns and vertical banners
industrial waste containers under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a parking garage overpass, temporarily sheltering from the open sky. Green dumpsters line the left side. Upon exiting the covered area, the Los Santos Forum arena comes into full view ahead, with its distinctive white columns and large banners visible against the sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area in front of arena building approaching intersection

beginning to cross the street at the intersection

entered.detail: red and white newspaper vending machines on the corner
blue USPS-style postal box next to the newspaper stands
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open plaza in front of the Los Santos Forum, the character approaches the street corner. Newspaper stands and a blue mailbox mark the corner as the character enters the crosswalk. A pedestrian is visible walking near the Forum entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with fast food restaurant and office towers

events.description: green garbage truck drives through the intersection from left to right
white delivery truck with red logo and red van pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear while observing vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: white box truck with red S logo driving through the intersection

entered.detail: fast food restaurant with distinctive red and yellow circular signage
tall modern glass office buildings with interior lights visible
overhead traffic light gantry showing red and green signals

segments.scene_description: Standing at the intersection crosswalk, the character waits as various vehicles pass through including a garbage truck and a delivery truck. The Burger Shot restaurant is prominent on the right, while twin office towers rise in the background. Traffic signals hang overhead as the sun continues to set.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with arena entrance facing sunset skyline

events.description: turning left to walk down the street toward the setting sun
view opens to wide street with dramatic sunset skyline and palm trees

agents.ego_description: finishing crossing the street and turning left to walk toward the sunset

entered.detail: classic red sedan driving on the street

segments.scene_description: The character completes crossing the street and turns left, revealing a dramatic view of the sunset down the wide avenue. The Los Santos Forum is now on the right side as vintage cars drive by. Palm trees line the street silhouetted against the bright orange and pink sunset sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet downtown district that transitions from a narrow street view to a wide, panoramic sunset vista. It begins on a glistening sidewalk as a white taco truck passes by, before the camera tilts upward to frame the Maze Bank skyscraper against a vibrant orange sky. The perspective then shifts as the character moves beneath the shadow of a parking garage overpass, emerging from the cover to reveal the white columns and banners of the Los Santos Forum arena. As the camera advances across an open plaza past newspaper stands and a blue mailbox, it pauses at a busy intersection where garbage and delivery trucks pass by a Burger Shot restaurant. Finally, the character completes the crossing and turns left, opening the view to a wide avenue lined with silhouetted palm trees and vintage cars under a dramatic pink and orange sunset.
